patch.value: pm 2026.5.31 accepts registerItemFields into the schema registry but exposes NO 'pm create --csv_source' setter for extension-registered scalar fields (verified: Unknown option --csv_source, exit 2). Chose to persist the --source label as an internal csv-source: tag (stripped from exports, surfaced via csv_source export column). schema capability is still declared honestly because registration genuinely succeeds.
csv_source persisted as tag, not scalar field
